About Us

Discover our journey and how we support entrepreneurs in reaching international markets.

WHO WE ARE?

Maximo International is the official channel partner of Alibaba.com in Bangladesh, helping businesses connect with global buyers.

  • Led by Bangladesh’s only Certified Alibaba.com Lecturer
  • Seasoned team with deep Alibaba B2B expertise.
  • Providing expert guidance for global buyer development.
  • Representing RMG globally since 2007 with 1,200+ suppliers.

Our journey began long before this partnership. As a Gold Supplier on Alibaba.com from the early days, our CEO, Mr. Nayem Hossain, built his success by connecting international buyers with the most suitable, compliant, and reliable factories in Bangladesh. What started as a focused buying agency gradually evolved into a powerful sourcing and supply-chain ecosystem. Today, with a trusted network of 1,200+ suppliers, vendors, and partner factories, we combine deep industry expertise with digital B2B innovation — helping Bangladeshi exporters unlock global opportunities through the world’s largest B2B marketplace.

WHAT WE DO?

We support Bangladeshi exporters in growing their global B2B presence as the official channel partner of Alibaba.com in Bangladesh.

  • Enable Bangladeshi exporters to connect with global buyers.
  • Provide strategic guidance to grow on Alibaba.com.
  • Help businesses increase visibility and generate export leads.

Our foundation is built on real industry experience — not theory. We understand factories, production, compliance, sourcing, and global buyer expectations because we’ve lived it. At Maximo International, we don’t just create online accounts. We build global trade bridges.

OUR STORY

About Maximo International

Maximo is one of the fastest growing ready-made garments manufacturing and exporting companies in Bangladesh. It began its journey back in 2007, now caters to some of the biggest and reputable retail brands in the industry.

OWe specialize in apparels design, development & merchandising, factory sourcing, vendor compliance, order negotiation, production planning & implementation as well quality assurance. We manage the entire supply chain from yarn to finished product overseeing to the complete production process giving our clients one-stop hassle-free ready-made garments buying solution. We are proud to be the official channel partner of Alibaba.com in Bangladesh, supporting businesses in expanding their global trade opportunities through digital platforms and innovative sourcing strategies

OUR SERVICES

Maximo International opens the door for Bangladeshi businesses to enter the global marketplace and grow beyond local boundaries.

DISCOVER OUR SERVICES

Discover our comprehensive range of professional services designed to help your business grow, enhance your online presence, and attract more customers. From optimizing your Alibaba.com store and product listings to strategic advertising and lead generation, we provide tailored solutions that build trust, boost visibility, and drive meaningful engagement, ensuring measurable business growth and long-term success.

Minisite Creation & Optimization

We make your Alibaba.com minisite professional, attractive, and buyer-friendly to boost trust and engagement.

Product Listing & SEO

We craft optimized product listings with keywords, descriptions, and images to boost Alibaba visibility and ranking

RFQ- Lead Generation

We help generate business leads through Alibaba RFQ by finding the right buyers and supporting effective quotation strategies

Alibaba Seller Account Management

We manage and optimize your Alibaba seller account to improve performance, visibility, and buyer engagement.

Admin & Customer Support

Providing steadfast support for smooth business operations.

Product Photography & PPC/Paid Advertising

Capturing your products beautifully and boosting your reach through strategic advertising
